title: sterculia stipulata var. stipulata
intro: Sterculia stipulata var. stipulata, also known as the sterculia or Sterculia stipulata, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and protecting against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Sterculia stipulata var. stipulata typically involve drying and processing the roots and leaves to make teas, infusions, or powders for use in traditional remedies.
